The '''Hutt Asteroid Station''', sometimes known as the '''Pirate Asteroid Base''', '''Black Sun pirate asteroid base''' or a '''simple base''', was a standardised design of [[Space station/Legends|space station]] built into the surface of an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]]. Designed and manufactured by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], they were commonly used by [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]], and outlaws throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] as well as their designers.

==Characteristics==
The Asteroid Station was well-armed, with two [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]], four [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] batteries, two [[Concussion missile launcher/Legends|concussion missile launchers]], an inbuilt [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield generator]], and considerable hangars for [[Starfighter/Legends|fightercraft]]. It was this heavy armament which led to their popularity with mercenary and pirate groups.

They would come into contact with both [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] forces on a number of occasions, including an [[Battle in the Ilum system|Imperial raid on a pirate nest]] over [[Ilum/Legends|Ilum]]. The [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] base was very weak compared to the [[Alliance Space Station]] and [[Cardan-class space station|''Cardan''-class space station]] used during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
